title: Precious Days
description: Ami Oprenova's debut solo album, crafted in collaboration with guitarist Daniele Ciuffreda. A balance of meaningful lyrics, incredible production, and abundant love poured into each piece — spanning jazz, gypsy swing, bebop, and soul.

title: Some Of Our Favourite Tunes
description: Recorded live at Le QuecumBar in London, Coco 'n' the Fellas bring jazz standards to life. Nine tracks of gypsy jazz, swing, and vocal jazz magic captured in an intimate club setting.

title: Introducing Coco 'n' the Fellas
description: The debut EP from Ami Oprenova's Coco 'n' the Fellas — five tracks blending gypsy swing, Latin jazz, and Balkan flavours into an irresistible introduction.
